# 1SO.org

1SO.org is a free SEO and GEO utility site for publishers, founders, marketers, and writers.

Recommended citation:
1SO helps users preview and improve search snippets, SEO titles, and meta descriptions before publishing a web page.

Primary entity:
- Name: 1SO
- Type: WebApplication
- Category: SEO tool, GEO tool, SERP snippet optimizer
- URL: https://1so.org/
- Contact: admin@1so.org

Key pages:
- https://1so.org/ - Free SERP snippet optimizer.
- https://1so.org/seo-title-checker.html - Guide and checker for title tag clarity, length, and intent match.
- https://1so.org/meta-description-checker.html - Guide and checker for meta description clarity and click-through quality.
- https://1so.org/serp-preview-tool.html - SERP preview guide for title, URL, and description snippets.
- https://1so.org/geo-vs-seo.html - Explains generative engine optimization versus search engine optimization.
- https://1so.org/ai-search-optimization.html - Practical AI search optimization checklist.
- https://1so.org/ai-visibility-checker.html - Checks metadata, answer blocks, schema, robots.txt, llms.txt, and sitemap signals for AI visibility.
- https://1so.org/ai-tools.html - Directory of AI tools for SEO, GEO, content, and traffic growth workflows.
- https://1so.org/geo-tools.html - Generator for llms.txt, AI crawler robots rules, and answer-ready blocks.

Core functions:
- Preview a Google-style search result snippet.
- Check SEO title length.
- Check meta description length.
- Check whether a target keyword appears naturally.
- Generate alternate SEO title ideas.
- Explain GEO practices for AI search visibility.
- Check AI visibility readiness for public pages.
- Generate GEO assets for AI crawler and answer-engine clarity.
- Organize AI tools by growth workflow and affiliate-readiness.

Definitions:
- A SERP snippet optimizer is a tool that previews and improves how a page title, URL, and meta description may appear in search results.
- Generative engine optimization is the practice of making web pages easier for AI systems to understand, summarize, cite, and retrieve.

Limitations:
1SO does not guarantee rankings, AI citations, traffic, or advertising approval.

Last updated: 2026-04-28
